steps.t: Resin can be found on pine trees in the forests in western Azanulbizar. You should gather pine tree resin.
Dráttur is located in Zirakazhâr. Bring the pine tree resin to Dráttur.
The cauldron is located in Zirakazhâr. You should put the resin into the cauldron.
The pitch-filled bucket can be found in Zirakazhâr. Collect the pitch-filled bucket.
Pitch cauldrons can be found along the walls of Zirakazhâr. You should fill the pitch cauldrons.
Dráttur is located in Amdân. Return to Dráttur.
